holdings.infoBox: USEW is an equity ETF with a total of 428 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Cambria US EW ETF (USEW) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides exposure to large-cap US companies. The fund invests in over 250 equity securities and other ETFs. USEW was launched on Dec 18, 2025 and is issued by Cambria.
